nasb.text: There were six branches going out of its sides; three branches of the lampstand from the one side of it and three branches of the lampstand from the other side of it;

esv.text: And there were six branches going out of its sides, three branches of the lampstand out of one side of it and three branches of the lampstand out of the other side of it;

cnv.text: 燈臺的兩邊伸出六個枝子，這一邊有三個燈臺枝子，那一邊也有三個燈臺枝子。

ccb.text: 灯台两边各伸出三个分枝，共有六个分枝。
